'''Ivar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tammuz-an (species)/Legends|Tammuz-an]] who worked as a [[Arms dealer/Legends|weapons dealer]] in [[Meirm City]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]] after fleeing his homeworld of [[Tammuz-an/Legends|Tammuz-an]]. He knew [[Limna Yith]] and was on friendly terms with [[Kutuab]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

==Sources==
